<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jegz Engineering — Engineering Skills for the Real World</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --blue: #1A3FD8;
    --blue-dark: #0D2490;
    --blue-light: #3A5FFF;
    --orange: #FF6B1A;
    --orange-light: #FF8C45;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --off-white: #F4F6FF;
    --text-dark: #0A0E2A;
    --text-gray: #5A6080;
    --border: #E2E6FF;
    --card-bg: #FFFFFF;
    --grad1: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D2490 0%, #1A3FD8 50%, #3A5FFF 100%);
    --grad2: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B1A, #FF8C45);
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    background: var(--white);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5 { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; }

  /* ───── NAV ───── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0 5%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    height: 70px;
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  nav.scrolled { box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(26,63,216,0.12); }
  .nav-logo img { height: 42px; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 36px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem;
    text-decoration: none; color: var(--text-dark);
    transition: color 0.2s; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--blue); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--grad1); color: #fff;
    padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 8px;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.88rem;
    text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(26,63,216,0.35); }
  .hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; }
  .hamburger span { width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--text-dark); transition: 0.3s; }

  /* ───── HERO ───── */
  #home {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--grad1);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    display: flex; align-items: center;
    padding: 100px 5% 60px;
  }
  .hero-bg-pattern {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.07;
    background-image: radial-gradient(circle, #fff 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
  }
  .hero-glow {
    position: absolute; width: 600px; height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,107,26,0.3), transparent 70%);
    top: -150px; right: -100px; border-radius: 50%;
    animation: glow-pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes glow-pulse { from { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); } to { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(1.1); } }
  .hero-inner {
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 24px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease both;
  }
  .hero-badge span { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--orange); border-radius: 50%; animation: blink 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }
  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.8rem);
    font-weight: 800; color: #fff; line-height: 1.1;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s 0.1s ease both;
  }
  .hero-title .accent { color: var(--orange); }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    margin-top: 20px; line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
  }
  .hero-actions {
    display: flex; gap: 16px; margin-top: 36px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s 0.3s ease both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--grad2); color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem;
    text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(255,107,26,0.4); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem;
    text-decoration: none; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
  .hero-stats {
    display: flex; gap: 32px; margin-top: 48px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s 0.4s ease both;
  }
  .hero-stat strong { display: block; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; }
  .hero-stat span { font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
  .hero-visual {
    position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
    animation: fadeInRight 0.8s 0.2s ease both;
  }
  .hero-card-main {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px; backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    width: 340px; position: relative; z-index: 2;
  }
  .hero-card-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .hero-card-main h3 { color: #fff; font-size: 1.2rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .hero-card-main p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.6; }
  .progress-item { margin-top: 20px; }
  .progress-label { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size: 0.82rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .progress-bar { height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; }
  .progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--grad2); border-radius: 3px; animation: progress-anim 1.5s ease both; }
  @keyframes progress-anim { from { width: 0 !important; } }
  .floating-badge {
    position: absolute; background: #fff; border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 12px 18px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600;
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  .floating-badge.one { top: -20px; right: -20px; }
  .floating-badge.two { bottom: 0; left: -30px; animation-delay: 1s; }
  .floating-badge .icon { font-size: 1.4rem; }
  @keyframes float { from { transform: translateY(0); } to { transform: translateY(-10px); } }

  @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  @keyframes fadeInRight { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }

  /* ───── SECTION SHARED ───── */
  section { padding: 90px 5%; }
  .section-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-tag {
    display: inline-block; background: rgba(26,63,216,0.08); color: var(--blue);
    padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .section-title { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.5vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.2; }
  .section-sub { color: var(--text-gray); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 12px; max-width: 560px; }

  /* ───── PROBLEM ───── */
  #problem { background: var(--off-white); }
  .problem-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 50px; }
  .problem-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .problem-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
    background: var(--grad2);
  }
  .problem-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(26,63,216,0.1); }
  .problem-card .icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .problem-card h3 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .problem-card p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ───── FEATURES ───── */
  #features { background: #fff; }
  .features-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 50px; }
  .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; }
  .feature-card {
    background: var(--off-white); border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s, background 0.3s;
    cursor: default;
  }
  .feature-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(26,63,216,0.1); background: #fff; }
  .feature-icon {
    width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px;
    background: var(--grad1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .feature-card h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .feature-card p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.6; }
  .feature-card.highlight {
    background: var(--grad1); color: #fff; border-color: transparent;
  }
  .feature-card.highlight .feature-icon { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
  .feature-card.highlight h3 { color: #fff; }
  .feature-card.highlight p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

  /* ───── COURSES ───── */
  #courses { background: var(--off-white); }
  .courses-controls {
    display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 30px 0;
    align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .filter-tabs { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .filter-tab {
    padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 100px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: #fff; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; color: var(--text-gray);
  }
  .filter-tab.active, .filter-tab:hover { background: var(--blue); color: #fff; border-color: var(--blue); }
  .search-box {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
  }
  .search-box input {
    border: none; outline: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--text-dark); width: 200px; background: transparent;
  }
  .courses-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; }
  .course-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  .course-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(26,63,216,0.1); }
  .course-thumb {
    height: 160px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 3rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .course-thumb .thumb-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; }
  .course-thumb .thumb-icon { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .course-body { padding: 22px; }
  .course-meta { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .course-tag {
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 100px;
  }
  .tag-cad { background: rgba(26,63,216,0.1); color: var(--blue); }
  .tag-elec { background: rgba(255,107,26,0.1); color: var(--orange); }
  .tag-civil { background: rgba(22,163,74,0.1); color: #16a34a; }
  .tag-mech { background: rgba(168,85,247,0.1); color: #a855f7; }
  .tag-beginner { background: rgba(22,163,74,0.1); color: #16a34a; }
  .tag-intermediate { background: rgba(234,179,8,0.1); color: #ca8a04; }
  .tag-advanced { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #dc2626; }
  .course-body h3 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.3; }
  .course-body p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 18px; }
  .course-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .course-free { color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .btn-course {
    background: var(--grad1); color: #fff; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.82rem; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-course:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(26,63,216,0.3); }

  /* ───── HOW IT WORKS ───── */
  #how { background: #fff; }
  .steps { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 0; margin-top: 50px; position: relative; }
  .steps::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 32px; left: 12.5%; right: 12.5%; height: 2px;
    background: var(--border); z-index: 0;
  }
  .step { text-align: center; padding: 0 20px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .step-num {
    width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 20px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.2rem;
    background: #fff; border: 2px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-gray);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .step.active .step-num { background: var(--grad1); color: #fff; border-color: var(--blue); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(26,63,216,0.3); }
  .step h3 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .step p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ───── ABOUT ───── */
  #about { background: var(--off-white); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; margin-top: 50px; }
  .about-img-wrap { position: relative; }
  .about-img {
    width: 100%; max-width: 420px; border-radius: 24px; display: block;
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(26,63,216,0.2);
    border: 4px solid #fff;
  }
  .about-img-badge {
    position: absolute; bottom: 30px; right: -20px;
    background: var(--grad1); color: #fff; border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 16px 22px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(26,63,216,0.3);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .about-img-badge strong { display: block; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; }
  .about-img-badge span { font-size: 0.78rem; opacity: 0.85; }
  .about-content h2 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.4rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .about-content p { color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 16px; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .about-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin-top: 24px; }
  .about-tag {
    background: rgba(26,63,216,0.08); color: var(--blue);
    padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600;
  }
  .contact-row { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-top: 28px; }
  .contact-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .contact-item .c-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px;
    background: rgba(26,63,216,0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ───── AI TUTOR ───── */
  #ai-tutor { background: var(--grad1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  #ai-tutor::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.05;
    background-image: radial-gradient(circle, #fff 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
  }
  .ai-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .ai-text .section-tag { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); }
  .ai-text .section-title { color: #fff; }
  .ai-text .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
  .ai-chat-demo {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  }
  .chat-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }
  .chat-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--grad2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.1rem; }
  .chat-header-info strong { display: block; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #fff; }
  .chat-header-info span { font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
  .chat-online { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #22c55e; border-radius: 50%; margin-left: auto; box-shadow: 0 0 8px #22c55e; }
  .chat-messages { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .msg { max-width: 80%; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.5; }
  .msg.user { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); align-self: flex-end; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; }
  .msg.bot { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); color: var(--text-dark); align-self: flex-start; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; }
  .chat-input-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; }
  .chat-input {
    flex: 1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem; outline: none;
  }
  .chat-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }
  .chat-send { background: var(--grad2); border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1rem; transition: transform 0.2s; }
  .chat-send:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }

  /* ───── TESTIMONIALS ───── */
  #testimonials { background: #fff; }
  .testi-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; margin-top: 50px; }
  .testi-card {
    background: var(--off-white); border-radius: 20px; padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  .testi-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(26,63,216,0.1); }
  .testi-stars { color: #f59e0b; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 16px; letter-spacing: 2px; }
  .testi-text { font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.7; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .testi-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
  .testi-avatar { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; }
  .testi-author-info strong { display: block; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .testi-author-info span { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-gray); }

  /* ───── CONTACT ───── */
  #contact { background: var(--off-white); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; margin-top: 50px; align-items: start; }
  .contact-form {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 36px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(26,63,216,0.06);
  }
  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .form-group label { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-dark); }
  .form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea {
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 16px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-dark);
    outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; background: var(--off-white);
  }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--blue); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,63,216,0.1); background: #fff;
  }
  .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 110px; }
  .contact-info h3 { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .contact-info p { color: var(--text-gray); line-height: 1.8; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .info-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .info-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(26,63,216,0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .info-item strong { display: block; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .info-item span { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-gray); }

  /* ───── FOOTER ───── */
  footer {
    background: var(--text-dark); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    padding: 60px 5% 30px;
  }
  .footer-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 50px; margin-bottom: 50px; }
  .footer-brand img { height: 36px; filter: brightness(0) invert(1); margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .footer-brand p { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .footer-col h4 { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 16px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
  .footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .footer-col a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-col a:hover { color: var(--orange); }
  .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 28px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: gap; }
  .footer-bottom p { font-size: 0.82rem; }
  .social-links { display: flex; gap: 12px; }
  .social-link { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; transition: background 0.2s; text-decoration: none; }
  .social-link:hover { background: var(--blue); }

  /* ───── MOBILE NAV ───── */
  .mobile-menu {
    display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.98); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 32px;
  }
  .mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .mobile-menu a { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--text-dark); text-decoration: none; }
  .mobile-close { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 5%; font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; }

  /* ───── RESPONSIVE ───── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-visual { display: none; }
    .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 30px; }
    .steps::before { display: none; }
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .ai-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .testi-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .nav-links, .nav-cta { display: none; }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    section { padding: 60px 5%; }
    .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .testi-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-actions { flex-direction: column; }
  }

  /* ───── SCROLL REVEAL ───── */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  /* ───── NOTIFICATION ───── */
  .toast {
    position: fixed; bottom: 30px; right: 30px; z-index: 9999;
    background: var(--grad1); color: #fff; padding: 16px 24px;
    border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(26,63,216,0.3);
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;
    transform: translateY(80px); opacity: 0; transition: all 0.4s ease;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  }
  .toast.show { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="mainNav">
  <a href="#home" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Jegz Engineering">
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#features">Features</a></li>
    <li><a href="#courses">Courses</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#courses" class="nav-cta">Start Learning →</a>
  <div class="hamburger" id="hamburger">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- MOBILE MENU -->
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <button class="mobile-close" id="mobileClose">✕</button>
  <a href="#home" onclick="closeMobile()">Home</a>
  <a href="#features" onclick="closeMobile()">Features</a>
  <a href="#courses" onclick="closeMobile()">Courses</a>
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMobile()">About</a>
  <a href="#contact" onclick="closeMobile()">Contact</a>
  <a href="#courses" class="nav-cta" onclick="closeMobile()">Start Learning →</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="home">
  <div class="hero-bg-pattern"></div>
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-badge">
        <span></span> Nigeria's #1 Engineering Ed-Tech Platform
      </div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">
        Engineering Skills<br>for the <span class="accent">Real World</span><br>— Without the High Costs
      </h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">
        Practical, industry-relevant courses for Nigerian engineering students. Master CAD, technical tools, and more — affordably and on your own schedule.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#courses" class="btn-primary">🚀 Start Learning Free</a>
        <a href="#features" class="btn-outline">📖 Explore Features</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hero-stat"><strong>500+</strong><span>Students Waiting</span></div>
        <div class="hero-stat"><strong>12+</strong><span>Courses Ready</span></div>
        <div class="hero-stat"><strong>2</strong><span>Universities Surveyed</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-visual">
      <div class="hero-card-main">
        <div class="hero-card-icon">🎓</div>
        <h3>Your Learning Dashboard</h3>
        <p>Track your progress across all engineering courses in one place.</p>
        <div class="progress-item">
          <div class="progress-label"><span>AutoCAD Fundamentals</span><span>78%</span></div>
          <div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:78%"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="progress-item">
          <div class="progress-label"><span>Civil Engineering Tools</span><span>45%</span></div>
          <div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:45%"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="progress-item">
          <div class="progress-label"><span>Structural Analysis</span><span>22%</span></div>
          <div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:22%"></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="floating-badge one">
        <span class="icon">⭐</span>
        <div><strong style="font-size:0.82rem">Top Rated</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-gray)">4.9 / 5.0</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="floating-badge two">
        <span class="icon">🎯</span>
        <div><strong style="font-size:0.82rem">CAD Certified</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-gray)">Industry Ready</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<section id="problem">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center">
      <div class="section-tag">The Problem</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Nigerian Engineering Students Deserve Better</h2>
      <p class="section-sub" style="margin:0 auto">The education gap is real — and we're here to close it.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-grid reveal">
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="icon">📚</div>
        <h3>Theory-Heavy Curriculum</h3>
        <p>Universities focus almost entirely on theory, leaving graduates unprepared for real engineering workplaces.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="icon">💸</div>
        <h3>Unaffordable Platforms</h3>
        <p>Udemy, Coursera, and similar platforms charge in dollars — out of reach for most Nigerian students.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="icon">📺</div>
        <h3>Unstructured YouTube</h3>
        <p>Students rely on scattered YouTube videos with no clear path, no mentorship, and no certification.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="icon">🔧</div>
        <h3>No CAD Training</h3>
        <p>Computer-Aided Design — the most in-demand engineering skill — is barely taught in Nigerian institutions.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section id="features">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="features-header reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="section-tag">Platform Features</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Everything You Need to<br>Succeed as an Engineer</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="section-sub">Built specifically for the Nigerian engineering student experience.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="features-grid reveal">
      <div class="feature-card highlight">
        <div class="feature-icon">🤖</div>
        <h3>AI Tutor Assistant</h3>
        <p>Ask any engineering question at any time. Our AI tutor provides instant, contextual answers to help you through complex topics.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon">📐</div>
        <h3>Structured CAD Courses</h3>
        <p>Step-by-step AutoCAD, SolidWorks, and Revit courses designed for beginners to advanced learners.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon">📊</div>
        <h3>Personal Dashboard</h3>
        <p>Track your enrolled courses, monitor progress, and never lose your place — your learning journey, organized.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon">👨‍🏫</div>
        <h3>Mentorship Access</h3>
        <p>Connect with industry professionals and experienced engineers who can guide your career development.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon">🏆</div>
        <h3>Certificates & Credentials</h3>
        <p>Earn verifiable certificates upon completion to showcase your skills to employers and clients.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon">📱</div>
        <h3>Mobile Friendly</h3>
        <p>Learn from anywhere — on your phone, tablet, or computer. No expensive hardware required.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- COURSES -->
<section id="courses">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center">
      <div class="section-tag">Courses</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Start Learning Today</h2>
      <p class="section-sub" style="margin:0 auto">Explore our growing library of practical engineering courses — all free to start.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="courses-controls reveal">
      <div class="filter-tabs">
        <button class="filter-tab active" onclick="filterCourses('all',this)">All</button>
        <button class="filter-tab" onclick="filterCourses('cad',this)">CAD</button>
        <button class="filter-tab" onclick="filterCourses('civil',this)">Civil</button>
        <button class="filter-tab" onclick="filterCourses('elec',this)">Electrical</button>
        <button class="filter-tab" onclick="filterCourses('mech',this)">Mechanical</button>
      </div>
      <div class="search-box">
        <span>🔍</span>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search courses..." id="courseSearch" oninput="searchCourses()">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="courses-grid" id="coursesGrid">
      <div class="course-card" data-category="cad">
        <div class="course-thumb">
          <div class="thumb-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1A3FD8,#3A5FFF)"></div>
          <div class="thumb-icon">📐</div>
        </div>
        <div class="course-body">
          <div class="course-meta"><span class="course-tag tag-cad">CAD</span><span class="course-tag tag-beginner">Beginner</span></div>
          <h3>AutoCAD Fundamentals for Engineers</h3>
          <p>Learn the core tools of AutoCAD — from basic drawing to professional 2D engineering plans.</p>
          <div class="course-footer">
            <span class="course-free">🆓 Free</span>
            <button class="btn-course" onclick="enrollAlert('AutoCAD Fundamentals')">Start Course →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="course-card" data-category="civil">
        <div class="course-thumb">
          <div class="thumb-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#22c55e)"></div>
          <div class="thumb-icon">🏗️</div>
        </div>
        <div class="course-body">
          <div class="course-meta"><span class="course-tag tag-civil">Civil</span><span class="course-tag tag-beginner">Beginner</span></div>
          <h3>Introduction to Structural Analysis</h3>
          <p>Understand how structures carry loads, calculate reactions, and apply fundamental civil concepts.</p>
          <div class="course-footer">
            <span class="course-free">🆓 Free</span>
            <button class="btn-course" onclick="enrollAlert('Structural Analysis')">Start Course →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="course-card" data-category="cad">
        <div class="course-thumb">
          <div class="thumb-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7)"></div>
          <div class="thumb-icon">🔩</div>
        </div>
        <div class="course-body">
          <div class="course-meta"><span class="course-tag tag-cad">CAD</span><span class="course-tag tag-intermediate">Intermediate</span></div>
          <h3>SolidWorks 3D Modelling Basics</h3>
          <p>Create 3D models and assemblies using SolidWorks — an essential skill for mechanical engineers.</p>
          <div class="course-footer">
            <span class="course-free">🆓 Free</span>
            <button class="btn-course" onclick="enrollAlert('SolidWorks 3D Modelling')">Start Course →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="course-card" data-category="elec">
        <div class="course-thumb">
          <div class="thumb-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FF6B1A,#FF8C45)"></div>
          <div class="thumb-icon">⚡</div>
        </div>
        <div class="course-body">
          <div class="course-meta"><span class="course-tag tag-elec">Electrical</span><span class="course-tag tag-beginner">Beginner</span></div>
          <h3>Circuit Design with Proteus</h3>
          <p>Simulate and design electrical circuits using Proteus — the industry tool for electronics engineers.</p>
          <div class="course-footer">
            <span class="course-free">🆓 Free</span>
            <button class="btn-course" onclick="enrollAlert('Circuit Design with Proteus')">Start Course →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="course-card" data-category="civil">
        <div class="course-thumb">
          <div class="thumb-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0891b2,#06b6d4)"></div>
          <div class="thumb-icon">🏢</div>
        </div>
        <div class="course-body">
          <div class="course-meta"><span class="course-tag tag-civil">Civil</span><span class="course-tag tag-intermediate">Intermediate</span></div>
          <h3>Revit Architecture & BIM Intro</h3>
          <p>Get started with Building Information Modelling (BIM) using Revit — the future of construction design.</p>
          <div class="course-footer">
            <span class="course-free">🆓 Free</span>
            <button class="btn-course" onclick="enrollAlert('Revit Architecture & BIM')">Start Course →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="course-card" data-category="mech">
        <div class="course-thumb">
          <div class="thumb-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#be185d,#ec4899)"></div>
          <div class="thumb-icon">⚙️</div>
        </div>
        <div class="course-body">
          <div class="course-meta"><span class="course-tag tag-mech">Mechanical</span><span class="course-tag tag-advanced">Advanced</span></div>
          <h3>Finite Element Analysis (FEA)</h3>
          <p>Perform stress and thermal analysis using FEA tools to validate engineering designs before fabrication.</p>
          <div class="course-footer">
            <span class="course-free">🆓 Free</span>
            <button class="btn-course" onclick="enrollAlert('Finite Element Analysis')">Start Course →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<section id="how">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center">
      <div class="section-tag">How It Works</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">From Signup to Skill in 4 Steps</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="steps reveal">
      <div class="step active">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <h3>Create Free Account</h3>
        <p>Sign up in seconds — no credit card required. Just your name and email.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step active">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <h3>Choose a Course</h3>
        <p>Browse our library and pick a course that fits your engineering interest and level.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step active">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <h3>Learn with AI Support</h3>
        <p>Go through structured lessons and ask our AI tutor when you get stuck.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-num">04</div>
        <h3>Get Certified</h3>
        <p>Complete the course, pass the assessment, and earn your verifiable certificate.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- AI TUTOR -->
<section id="ai-tutor">
  <div class="ai-inner">
    <div class="ai-text reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">AI Powered</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Meet Your Personal Engineering Tutor</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Available 24/7 — ask anything about your courses, engineering concepts, or career advice. No waiting for office hours.</p>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="margin-top:30px;display:inline-flex">💬 Try AI Tutor</a>
    </div>
    <div class="ai-chat-demo reveal">
      <div class="chat-header">
        <div class="chat-avatar">🤖</div>
        <div class="chat-header-info">
          <strong>Jegz AI Tutor</strong>
          <span>Engineering Assistant</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chat-online"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="chat-messages">
        <div class="msg user">What is the difference between AutoCAD and Revit?</div>
        <div class="msg bot">Great question! AutoCAD is a 2D/3D drafting tool used for precise technical drawings, while Revit is a BIM (Building Information Modelling) platform that creates intelligent 3D building models with data embedded. Engineers typically use AutoCAD for 2D layouts and Revit for complete building projects. 🏗️</div>
        <div class="msg user">Which should I learn first as a civil engineer?</div>
        <div class="msg bot">Start with AutoCAD — it builds your foundational drafting skills. Once you're comfortable with drawing conventions and 2D plans (usually 2–3 months), move to Revit. Most Nigerian firms still use AutoCAD daily, so it's the more immediately employable skill! 🎯</div>
      </div>
      <div class="chat-input-row">
        <input class="chat-input" type="text" placeholder="Ask an engineering question..." id="chatInput">
        <button class="chat-send" onclick="sendChat()">➤</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section id="testimonials">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center">
      <div class="section-tag">Testimonials</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">What Students Are Saying</h2>
      <p class="section-sub" style="margin:0 auto">Early feedback from our research participants and beta users.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="testi-grid reveal">
      <div class="testi-card">
        <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testi-text">"I've always wanted to learn AutoCAD but Udemy was too expensive. Jegz Engineering is exactly what I needed — structured, affordable, and made for us Nigerians."</p>
        <div class="testi-author">
          <div class="testi-avatar" style="background:var(--grad1)">AM</div>
          <div class="testi-author-info"><strong>Aisha Musa</strong><span>Civil Engineering Student, UNIMAID</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="testi-card">
        <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testi-text">"The AI tutor feature is amazing. I used to waste hours searching YouTube for answers. Now I just ask and get a clear, direct explanation instantly."</p>
        <div class="testi-author">
          <div class="testi-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#22c55e)">IB</div>
          <div class="testi-author-info"><strong>Ibrahim Bello</strong><span>Mechanical Engineering, Ramat Polytechnic</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="testi-card">
        <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testi-text">"What I love most is that the courses are built for Nigerian students. The examples are relatable, the pace is right, and it's actually free to start. Highly recommend."</p>
        <div class="testi-author">
          <div class="testi-avatar" style="background:var(--grad2)">FK</div>
          <div class="testi-author-info"><strong>Fatima Kolo</strong><span>Electrical Engineering, UNIMAID</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-img-wrap reveal">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Muhammad Buhari Haruna" class="about-img">
        <div class="about-img-badge">
          <strong>2025</strong>
          <span>Founded Jegz Engineering</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-content reveal">
        <div class="section-tag">About the Founder</div>
        <h2>Muhammad Buhari Haruna</h2>
        <p>I am a 27-year-old aspiring entrepreneur and Civil Engineering graduate from Maiduguri, Borno State. My academic journey exposed me firsthand to the massive gap between what universities teach and what the engineering industry actually demands.</p>
        <p>That experience became the fuel behind Jegz Engineering — a platform designed to give every Nigerian engineering student access to practical, affordable, and structured skill development, starting with the tools most in demand: CAD software and technical design tools.</p>
        <p>Through primary market research at the University of Maiduguri and Ramat Polytechnic, I validated strong demand for this platform. I've been building Jegz Engineering since 2025, combining product ideation, user research, and no-code MVP development to bring this vision to life.</p>
        <div class="about-tags">
          <span class="about-tag">🎓 Civil Engineering Graduate</span>
          <span class="about-tag">🚀 EdTech Founder</span>
          <span class="about-tag">🔬 User Research</span>
          <span class="about-tag">💡 Product Ideation</span>
          <span class="about-tag">🌍 Nigeria-Focused</span>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-row">
          <div class="contact-item"><div class="c-icon">📍</div><span>Maiduguri, Borno State, Nigeria</span></div>
          <div class="contact-item"><div class="c-icon">📞</div><span>+234 814 781 1474</span></div>
          <div class="contact-item"><div class="c-icon">✉️</div><span>bharuna6569@gmail.com</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center">
      <div class="section-tag">Get In Touch</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Join the Waitlist or Send Feedback</h2>
      <p class="section-sub" style="margin:0 auto">Be among the first to access Jegz Engineering, or reach out with questions, partnerships, or ideas.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid reveal">
      <div class="contact-form">
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:24px">Send a Message</h3>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group"><label>First Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Your first name"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>Last Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Your last name"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Email Address</label><input type="email" placeholder="you@example.com"></div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>I am a...</label>
          <select>
            <option>Engineering Student</option>
            <option>Working Engineer</option>
            <option>Instructor / Educator</option>
            <option>Potential Partner / Investor</option>
            <option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Message</label><textarea placeholder="Your message, question, or feedback..."></textarea></div>
        <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center" onclick="submitForm()">Send Message ✉️</button>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-info">
        <h3>Contact Information</h3>
        <p>Have questions about the platform, want to partner with us, or interested in contributing a course? We'd love to hear from you.</p>
        <div class="info-item"><div class="info-icon">📍</div><div><strong>Location</strong><span>Maiduguri, Borno State, Nigeria</span></div></div>
        <div class="info-item"><div class="info-icon">📞</div><div><strong>Phone</strong><span>+234 814 781 1474</span></div></div>
        <div class="info-item"><div class="info-icon">✉️</div><div><strong>Email</strong><span>bharuna6569@gmail.com</span></div></div>
        <div class="info-item"><div class="info-icon">🕐</div><div><strong>Response Time</strong><span>Within 24 hours</span></div></div>
        <div style="margin-top:36px;background:var(--grad1);border-radius:16px;padding:28px;color:#fff">
          <h4 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:10px">🚀 Early Access</h4>
          <p style="font-size:0.88rem;opacity:0.85;line-height:1.7">Sign up above to get early access when we launch. Be part of the founding community and help shape the future of engineering education in Nigeria.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div class="footer-brand">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Jegz Engineering">
        <p>Empowering Nigerian engineering students with practical, affordable, and structured learning — one skill at a time.</p>
        <div class="social-links">
          <a class="social-link" href="#">🐦</a>
          <a class="social-link" href="#">💼</a>
          <a class="social-link" href="#">📸</a>
          <a class="social-link" href="#">▶️</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4>Platform</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#courses">Courses</a></li>
          <li><a href="#features">Dashboard</a></li>
          <li><a href="#ai-tutor">AI Tutor</a></li>
          <li><a href="#features">Mentorship</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4>Company</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#about">About Us</a></li>
          <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
          <li><a href="#">Blog</a></li>
          <li><a href="#">Careers</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4>Resources</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#">Submit a Course</a></li>
          <li><a href="#">Become a Mentor</a></li>
          <li><a href="#">Help Centre</a></li>
          <li><a href="#">Privacy Policy</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <p>© 2025 Jegz Engineering. Built with 💙 for Nigerian engineering students.</p>
      <p style="font-size:0.8rem;opacity:0.5">Made by Muhammad Buhari Haruna</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- TOAST -->
<div class="toast" id="toast">✅ Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.</div>

<script>
  // Nav scroll effect
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
    nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 20);
  });

  // Hamburger
  document.getElementById('hamburger').addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.add('open');
  });
  document.getElementById('mobileClose').addEventListener('click', closeMobile);
  function closeMobile() { document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open'); }

  // Scroll reveal
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((e, i) => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 80);
        observer.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  reveals.forEach(r => observer.observe(r));

  // Course filtering
  function filterCourses(cat, btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.course-card').forEach(card => {
      if (cat === 'all' || card.dataset.category === cat) {
        card.style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        card.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });
  }

  // Search
  function searchCourses() {
    const q = document.getElementById('courseSearch').value.toLowerCase();
    document.querySelectorAll('.course-card').forEach(card => {
      const text = card.innerText.toLowerCase();
      card.style.display = text.includes(q) ? 'block' : 'none';
    });
  }

  // Enroll alert
  function enrollAlert(name) {
    showToast('🚀 Enrolling in "' + name + '" — Coming soon!');
  }

  // Chat
  function sendChat() {
    const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
    const val = input.value.trim();
    if (!val) return;
    const msgs = document.querySelector('.chat-messages');
    const userMsg = document.createElement('div');
    userMsg.className = 'msg user';
    userMsg.textContent = val;
    msgs.appendChild(userMsg);
    input.value = '';
    setTimeout(() => {
      const botMsg = document.createElement('div');
      botMsg.className = 'msg bot';
      botMsg.textContent = 'Thanks for your question! Our full AI tutor is coming soon. For now, enroll in a course and our team will be happy to help you. 🎓';
      msgs.appendChild(botMsg);
      msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;
    }, 800);
  }

  document.getElementById('chatInput').addEventListener('keypress', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') sendChat();
  });

  // Form submit
  function submitForm() {
    showToast('✅ Message sent! We\'ll get back to you within 24 hours.');
  }

  // Toast
  function showToast(msg) {
    const t = document.getElementById('toast');
    t.textContent = msg;
    t.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 3500);
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
